title: pimpinella corymbosa var. kotschyana
intro: Pimpinella corymbosa var. kotschyana, also known as the Iranian anise or kotschy anise, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella corymbosa var. kotschyana include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
